overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character walking through a frontier town at night. The character travels from a cobblestone commercial street past saloons and shops, through a covered boardwalk, and finally to a residential house on the outskirts, illuminated by warm gas lamps against a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town commercial street with saloons

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the curved street
passing an NPC standing outside the saloon entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone street, passing wooden crates and storefronts

notable_agents.action: standing stationary outside the saloon entrance, observing the street

entered.detail: two-story wooden frontier building with 'SALOON' painted on windows and green awning
stacked wooden shipping crates on the sidewalk
cast iron gas lamp post with warm yellow glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a cobblestone street in a Western town at night, passing by a saloon with illuminated windows and wooden crates stacked on the sidewalk. An NPC stands near the saloon entrance as the character continues toward a covered walkway in the distance.

events.description: entering covered wooden boardwalk with overhead roof supported by white pillars

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered walkway, passing by darkened storefronts

entered.detail: wooden overhead roof structure providing cover over the walkway
white painted wooden posts supporting the roof structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered wooden boardwalk with overhead roofing supported by white pillars. The area is dimly lit with warm light spilling from storefront windows as the character walks along the wooden planks, leaving the open cobblestone street behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential outskirts with dirt ground and wooden plank path

events.description: exiting covered walkway onto open dirt ground with wooden plank path leading to residential area
transitioning from wooden sidewalk to wooden plank path over dirt ground

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden planks toward a house on the outskirts of town

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and grass area replacing the cobblestone street
elevated wooden plank walkway leading through the dirt
single-story wooden house with front porch and white railing
decorative lights strung between buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered boardwalk, the scene opens to a darker residential area with dirt ground and a wooden plank path. The character walks toward a wooden house with a front porch, while festive string lights glow in the distance against the night sky.

events.description: arriving at the wooden house with white porch railing
climbing wooden stairs onto the house porch

agents.ego_description: approaching the house and climbing the porch stairs to the entrance

entered.detail: covered wooden porch with white railing and stairs
warm glowing lantern mounted beside the door
wooden front door with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the wooden house, climbing the stairs onto the front porch. The porch is illuminated by a warm lantern beside the door, and the character turns to look back at the town lights visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a frontier town at night, transitioning from a bustling commercial street to a quiet residential porch. It begins on a cobblestone road past a saloon with glowing windows and stacked crates, moving steadily toward a covered walkway. As the character enters the wooden boardwalk, the open street is replaced by a dimly lit corridor of white pillars and warm light spilling from storefronts. The scene then opens into a darker residential area with dirt ground and a plank path, leading toward a wooden house as festive string lights appear in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character up the stairs onto a porch illuminated by a warm lantern, before turning back to view the distant lights of the town.
